title: Ungebaut's Wildlife
description: Adds a monkey, a marmot, and a penguin to creative mode.
body:
Adds 3 new mobs to creative mode:

Monkey that throws poop when you hit it
Marmot that spits
Penguin that waddles

Done as a commission on Fiverr.

Want a custom mod made just for you?
[https://www.fiverr.com/coolkc456](https://www.fiverr.com/coolkc456)
